post.description:
Search public grant opportunities. Integrates hybrid semantic vector search
with SQL fallback to guarantee seamless offline local development.

schema.title: Response Search Grants Api V1 Grants Search Post

get.description:
Get ranked grant opportunities matching the organization's profile.

Delegates matching logic to GrantMatchingService, which handles vector
similarity search, AI explanation caching, and SQL fallback.

schema.title: Response Get Grant Matches Api V1 Grants Matches Get

get.description:
Fetch a single grant opportunity by its database ID.

Args:
    grant_id: The primary key of the Grant record to retrieve.

Returns:
    The matching GrantOut schema.

Raises:
    404 error_response: If no grant with the given ID exists.
List all proposals belonging to the current user's organisation.

schema.title: Response List Proposals Api V1 Proposals  Get

post.description:
Trigger a new proposal generation for a grant.

Validates the organisation's subscription usage limit (FR-21) before
queueing the async Celery task.  Returns ``202 Accepted`` immediately
with the proposal record; the actual generation runs in the background.

get.description: Retrieve a single proposal by its ID (organisation-scoped).
